-This site is best viewed in 800x600 with Internet Explorer 3.0 or higher.  If it is viewed in Netscape, it doesn't look right.

 


Pilif Saga

Dragonball starts off as young Son Goku meets Bulma. Bulma hits Son Goku with her car, surprisingly Son Goku and his fish weren't injured at all. Bulma then explains to Son Gokoh what DragonBalls are, Son Goku tells Bulma that he has a DragoBall; has four stars on it. Son Goku refuses to give up the DragonBall so he decides to join Bulma for the DragonBalls. During there journies Son Goku and Bulma make tons of friends including, Oolong, Yamcha, Kame-sama, ChiChi, and King Ox. Later in the saga Son Goku and the others battle Pilif. During this battle Goku turns Oozaru (Big Monkeys) form destroying Pilif's castle.

Red Ribbon Saga

During this saga Son Goku goes under training with Kame-sama (Master Roshi), later Krillin joins Son Gokoh in training. Kame-sama teaches Son Goku and Krillin the dreaded Kamehameha. Later Son Goku gets trained again by Karin, but this time his training was used to defeat Dr. Gero.

Piccolo Saga

This saga starts off as Son Goku enters the Tenkaichi-Budokai, during this tournament Son Goku meets Tien and Choazu.The final match is between Son Goku and Tien, Son Goku loses in this battle. After the battle Krillin is murdered, Son Goku starts looking for the killer. Meantime Piccolo-Diamoho is causing terror around the world. In a battle with Piccolo-Diamoho, Tien is about to die, when suddenely Son Goku arrives and defeats Piccolo-Diamoho. Before Piccolo-Daimoho dies he gives birth. Knowing that Piccolo-Damioho gave birth, Kami-sama trains Goku. At the next tournament, Son Goku battles Piccolo-Damioho and defeats him, sparing his life at the end. At the end of the series Son Goku matures, meets Chi-Chi and marries her.
